/usr/bin/c++ -O2 CMakeFiles/lanswift_transfer.dir/lanswift_transfer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lanswift_transfer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lanswift_transfer.dir/src/core/MD5Helper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lanswift_transfer.dir/src/core/ResumeManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lanswift_transfer.dir/src/core/SendWorker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lanswift_transfer.dir/src/core/RecvWorker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lanswift_transfer.dir/src/core/TransferManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lanswift_transfer.dir/src/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lanswift_transfer.dir/src/ui/ProgressWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lanswift_transfer.dir/src/ui/FileListView.cpp.o -o bin/lanswift_transfer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
